info.description: Authoritative FastAPI/NATS control plane for the Pocket Lab React PWA. Tier 13 serves existing /api contracts, publishes command/event traffic over NATS/JetStream, keeps event-sourced workflows, and adds bounded runtime observability health status through FastAPI.
info.title: Pocket Lab FastAPI/NATS Control API
